title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入喀麦隆：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入喀麥隆：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Cameroon ANOR conformity requirements (including PECAE pre-shipment import conformity programme), ARSEL electricity sector licensing, ENEO and SONATREL grid-connection requirements, IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 international standards referenced in donor and IPP project specifications, local fire authority installation expectations, UN 38.3 transport requirements, and 50 Hz grid context — versus China GB/T 36558-2023, GB/T 34120-2023, and NB/T 42090-2016 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与喀麦隆ANOR合格评定要求（包括PECAE装运前进口合格评定程序）、ARSEL电力行业许可、ENEO和SONATREL并网要求、捐助方和IPP项目规格中引用的IEC 62619和IEC 62933国际标准、当地消防安装要求、UN 38.3运输要求及50 Hz电网背景——对比中国GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090-2016基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與喀麥隆ANOR合格評定要求（包括PECAE裝運前進口合格評定程序）、ARSEL電力行業許可、ENEO和SONATREL併網要求、捐助方和IPP項目規格中引用的IEC 62619和IEC 62933國際標準、當地消防安裝要求、UN 38.3運輸要求及50 Hz電網背景——對比中國GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090-2016基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, ANOR conformity scope determination, ARSEL licensing approval, ENEO or SONATREL grid-connection approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Cameroon ANOR Technical Regulations and PECAE pre-shipment conformity requirements, ARSEL licensing requirements, ENEO and SONATREL grid-connection technical specifications, local fire authority installation requirements, UN transport regulations, and donor or project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、ANOR合格评定范围裁定、ARSEL许可审批、ENEO或SONATREL并网批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行喀麦隆ANOR技术法规及PECAE装运前合格评定要求、ARSEL许可要求、ENEO和SONATREL并网技术规格、当地消防主管机关安装要求、UN运输法规及捐助方或项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、ANOR合格評定範圍裁定、ARSEL許可審批、ENEO或SONATREL併網批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行喀麥隆ANOR技術法規及PECAE裝運前合格評定要求、ARSEL許可要求、ENEO和SONATREL併網技術規格、當地消防主管機關安裝要求、UN運輸法規及捐助方或項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: Cameroon does not yet have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation equivalent to a mandatory IEC 62619 certification regime. BESS projects in Cameroon operate primarily under ANOR conformity assessment (including the PECAE pre-shipment import conformity programme for regulated product categories), ARSEL electricity sector licensing, and ENEO or SONATREL grid-connection requirements. Cameroon's grid operates at 230/400 V 50 Hz; China's grid operates at 220/380 V — requiring PCS re-parameterisation. The practical gaps for Chinese BESS exported to Cameroon are: (1) ANOR PECAE pre-shipment conformity verification — confirm whether BESS cells, modules, or systems fall within the current PECAE regulated-product scope and obtain the required Certificate of Conformity before shipment; (2) IEC 62619 and IEC 62133 cell and module safety evidence as the internationally expected baseline in donor-financed and IPP project specifications; (3) IEC 62933-5-2 system-level safety evidence where referenced in ARSEL licensing or project-owner specifications; (4) ARSEL electricity sector licensing for operators and project developers; (5) ENEO or SONATREL grid-connection approval with bilingual (French and English) technical documentation; (6) UN 38.3 transport test documentation mandatory under international transport conventions; and (7) compliance with local fire and building authority installation requirements, as no national BESS-specific fire code exists in Cameroon. Chinese GB/T 36558-2023, GB/T 34120-2023, and NB/T 42090-2016 represent the manufacturing baseline but are not accepted as substitutes for IEC standards in donor, ARSEL, or project-owner review.
answer_first.zh: 喀麦隆尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规，与强制性IEC 62619认证制度相当。喀麦隆的BESS项目主要依据ANOR合格评定（包括针对受监管产品类别的PECAE装运前进口合格评定程序）、ARSEL电力行业许可及ENEO或SONATREL并网要求运作。喀麦隆电网运行参数为230/400 V 50 Hz；中国电网为220/380 V——需对储能变流器重新进行参数配置。中国BESS出口喀麦隆的实际差距包括：（1）ANOR PECAE装运前合格评定——确认BESS电芯、模组或系统是否属于现行PECAE受监管产品范围，并在出货前取得所需合格证书；（2）IEC 62619和IEC 62133电芯和模组安全证据，作为捐助方融资和IPP项目规格中的国际预期基准；（3）ARSEL许可或项目业主规格中引用的IEC 62933-5-2系统级安全证据；（4）运营商和项目开发商的ARSEL电力行业许可；（5）ENEO或SONATREL并网批准，须提供法英双语技术文件；（6）国际运输公约强制要求的UN 38.3运输测试文件；（7）遵守当地消防和建筑主管机关安装要求（喀麦隆尚无国家级BESS专项消防规范）。中国GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090-2016是生产基准，但在捐助方、ARSEL或项目业主审查中不被接受为IEC标准的替代依据。
answer_first.zht: 喀麥隆尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規，與強制性IEC 62619認證制度相當。喀麥隆的BESS項目主要依據ANOR合格評定（包括針對受監管產品類別的PECAE裝運前進口合格評定程序）、ARSEL電力行業許可及ENEO或SONATREL併網要求運作。喀麥隆電網運行參數為230/400 V 50 Hz；中國電網為220/380 V——需對儲能變流器重新進行參數配置。中國BESS出口喀麥隆的實際差距包括：（1）ANOR PECAE裝運前合格評定——確認BESS電芯、模組或系統是否屬於現行PECAE受監管產品範圍，並在出貨前取得所需合格證書；（2）IEC 62619和IEC 62133電芯和模組安全證據，作為捐助方融資和IPP項目規格中的國際預期基準；（3）ARSEL許可或項目業主規格中引用的IEC 62933-5-2系統級安全證據；（4）運營商和項目開發商的ARSEL電力行業許可；（5）ENEO或SONATREL併網批准，須提供法英雙語技術文件；（6）國際運輸公約強制要求的UN 38.3運輸測試文件；（7）遵守當地消防和建築主管機關安裝要求（喀麥隆尚無國家級BESS專項消防規範）。中國GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090-2016是製造基準，但在捐助方、ARSEL或項目業主審查中不被接受為IEC標準的替代依據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
